macro_onchain.en: 1) 24h Liquidation Data & Long/Short Liquidation Ratio: SOL long $3,644/short $539,995 (ratio 0.01), DOGE long $242,237/short $1,836,202 (ratio 0.13), ETH long $1,186,203/short $4,635,942 (ratio 0.26), showing significant short liquidation pain. 2) Whale Net Inflow/Outflow: SOL 24h token net flow withdrawal 5,804.2 SOL (bullish), 24h stablecoin net outflow $-21,253 (bearish); ETH 24h token net flow 0 ETH (neutral), 24h stablecoin net outflow $0 (neutral). 3) Funding Rate: SOL -0.0133% (extreme negative), DOGE 0.0100% (extreme positive), ETH 0.0013% (slightly positive).

quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib top-ranked coins: SOL (score 0.009, rank 1), DOGE (score 0.0053, rank 2), BNB (score 0.0033, rank 3). SOL's Qlib score is significantly higher (0.009 vs 0.0053), combined with technical oversold and crowded shorts, providing strong signal. Volatility deviations: SOL funding Z-Score=-45.24% (statistically significant negative deviation), DOGE funding Z-Score=103.60% (statistically significant positive deviation), indicating extreme sentiment.

regime_safety.zh: 最终判读：鲸鱼轧空（WHALE_SQUEEZE）。依据：SOL和DOGE的空头拥挤（持仓L/S比和爆仓多空比显示），资金费率极端（SOL负值，DOGE正值），鲸鱼短期流向（SOL提币）提供积累迹象，技术面超卖（SOL RSI低）增加反弹概率，符合轧空剧本。
regime_safety.en: Select and justify: WHALE_SQUEEZE. Basis: Crowded shorts in SOL and DOGE (per L/S ratios and liquidation ratios), extreme funding (SOL negative, DOGE positive), whale short-term flow (SOL withdrawal) shows accumulation, technical oversold (SOL low RSI) increases bounce probability, aligning with squeeze playbook.

original_invalidation_rule.zh: 明确描述：若价格跌破$82.00（止损位），或资金费率Z-Score上升至>-50%（表明空头压力缓解），或RSI上升至>50但价格未涨（动能衰竭），则多头论点失效，应立即离场。
original_invalidation_rule.en: Clearly state: if price breaks below $82.00 (SL), or funding Z-Score rises to >-50% (indicating short pressure easing), or RSI rises above 50 without price increase (momentum exhaustion), the long thesis is invalidated, exit immediately.

entry_reason.en: 1) Why this coin: SOL technical oversold (RSI=36.89), SMA deviation -4.90%, extreme negative funding (Z-Score=-45.24%), liquidation ratio 0.01 shows short pain, whale 24h token flow withdrawal (bullish). 2) Why now: Price near key support, crowded shorts may trigger squeeze. 3) RRR Math: Entry $83.35, SL $82.0 (risk 1.62%), TP $86.0 (profit 3.18%), RRR=3.18%/1.62%=1.96. 4) NAV Risk: Since already hold SOL position, adding new trade could over-concentrate risk; current position is 15.8% of NAV, new addition needs caution. RRR above 1.5, but portfolio risk dictates monitor.

analysis_summary.zh: [叙事校验]：当前市场处于熊市环境（BTC RSI_1D=42.3，价格低于SMA50），宏观背景显示VIX恐慌指数升至31.05（极端恐慌），美元指数走强（DXY=100.15），风险偏好下降。价格走势与负面宏观一致，但部分资产（如SOL）出现技术性超卖（RSI=36.89）和资金费率负极端（Z-Score=-45.24%），表明空头拥挤，可能已部分定价。新闻焦点暂无新驱动，这属于动能衰竭而非新信号触发。[决策依据详情]：SOL的Qlib分数最高（0.009），排名第一，但技术面RSI=36.89（超卖），ADX=37.8（趋势中等），均线偏离度-4.90%（价格低于SMA50），资金费率Z-Score=-45.24%（极端负值），24h爆仓多空比=0.01（空头爆仓远多于多头）。ETH的RSI=40.4，ADX=32.3，均线偏离度-3.45%，资金费率Z-Score=31.95%（正值），24h爆仓多空比=0.26（空头爆仓多于多头）。DOGE的RSI=51.26（中性），资金费率Z-Score=103.60%（极端正值），24h爆仓多空比=0.13（空头爆仓远多于多头）。[痛苦交易]：基于爆仓多空比和L/S比，SOL（爆仓多空比0.01，持仓L/S比账户数1.73/持仓量0.84）和DOGE（爆仓多空比0.13，持仓L/S比账户数1.54/持仓量0.79）显示空头拥挤且正遭受强平痛苦，存在空头轧空机会；ETH（爆仓多空比0.26，持仓L/S比账户数1.51/持仓量0.88）空头也有一定压力。多头在BTC和BNB中相对拥挤（BTC爆仓多空比0.29，持仓L/S比账户数1.33/持仓量0.92；BNB爆仓多空比0.00，持仓L/S比账户数0.89/持仓量0.88），但强平痛苦较低。[剧本选择]：当前微观结构支持MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE剧本，因为SOL和DOGE的空头拥挤（资金费率负极端或正极端，爆仓多空比极低）且价格在关键支撑位附近（SOL接近SMA50偏离-4.90%，DOGE均线偏离+1.17%），存在强制平仓风险，而鲸鱼数据（SOL 24h代币流向提币囤货）提供额外确认。TREND_FOLLOWING被拒绝，因为整体趋势熊市且动量负值（avg_momentum_12=-0.0117）。MEAN_REVERSION被拒绝，因为虽然RSI超卖，但空头挤压风险更高，且鲸鱼流向不支持反转。
analysis_summary.en: [Narrative Validation]: Market is in bearish regime (BTC RSI_1D=42.3, price below SMA50), macro context shows VIX spiking to 31.05 (extreme panic) and DXY strengthening (100.15), indicating risk-off sentiment. Price action aligns with negative macro, but some assets (e.g., SOL) show technical oversold (RSI=36.89) and extreme negative funding (Z-Score=-45.24%), suggesting crowded shorts may be partially priced in. No new news drivers, indicating momentum exhaustion rather than new impulse. [Decision Details]: SOL has highest Qlib score (0.009), rank 1, but technicals: RSI=36.89 (oversold), ADX=37.8 (moderate trend), SMA deviation -4.90% (price below SMA50), funding Z-Score=-45.24% (extreme negative), 24h liquidation ratio=0.01 (shorts liquidated far more than longs). ETH: RSI=40.4, ADX=32.3, SMA deviation -3.45%, funding Z-Score=31.95% (positive), liquidation ratio=0.26. DOGE: RSI=51.26 (neutral), funding Z-Score=103.60% (extreme positive), liquidation ratio=0.13. [Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation ratios and L/S ratios, SOL (liquidation ratio 0.01, L/S ratio accounts 1.73/position 0.84) and DOGE (liquidation ratio 0.13, L/S ratio accounts 1.54/position 0.79) show crowded shorts with high liquidation pain, indicating short squeeze potential; ETH (liquidation ratio 0.26, L/S ratio accounts 1.51/position 0.88) has moderate short pressure. Longs are relatively crowded in BTC and BNB (BTC liquidation ratio 0.29, L/S ratio accounts 1.33/position 0.92; BNB liquidation ratio 0.00, L/S ratio accounts 0.89/position 0.88) but with lower liquidation pain. [Scenario Selection]: MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE is chosen due to crowded shorts in SOL and DOGE (extreme funding, low liquidation ratios) with price near key support (SOL SMA deviation -4.90%, DOGE SMA deviation +1.17%), risking forced covering, and whale data (SOL 24h token flow withdrawal) provides confirmation. TREND_FOLLOWING rejected due to overall bearish trend and negative momentum (avg_momentum_12=-0.0117). MEAN_REVERSION rejected because although RSI oversold, short squeeze risk is higher and whale flows don't support reversal.

red_team_audit.zh: 如果我的判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 宏观风险加剧（如VIZ进一步上升或美元指数飙升）可能引发全市场抛售，压倒任何轧空尝试，导致价格继续下跌。2) 鲸鱼数据可能滞后或误导：SOL的24h代币流向提币（5,804.2 SOL）规模较小，而7d流向为充币抛售（-2,455,127.6 SOL），表明长期趋势仍是抛售，短期提币可能只是噪音。3) 技术面超卖（RSI低）可能持续更久，价格可能跌破支撑位（如SOL的$82.00）触发多头止损，而非反弹。数据支撑反面结论：BTC和ETH的RSI也偏低但未反弹，显示整体弱势；DOGE的资金费率极端正值（103.60%）可能吸引更多空头而非引发轧空。
red_team_audit.en: If my thesis is wrong, the most likely reasons are: 1) Macro risks worsening (e.g., VIX rising further or DXY surging) could trigger broad market sell-off, overwhelming any squeeze attempts and causing continued price decline. 2) Whale data may be lagging or misleading: SOL's 24h token flow withdrawal (5,804.2 SOL) is small-scale, while 7d flow is to-exchange selling (-2,455,127.6 SOL), indicating long-term selling trend, and short-term withdrawal could be noise. 3) Technical oversold (low RSI) could persist longer, price might break support (e.g., SOL $82.00) triggering long stops instead of bouncing. Data supporting opposite view: BTC and ETH also have low RSI but no bounce, showing overall weakness; DOGE's extreme positive funding (103.60%) might attract more shorts rather than trigger squeeze.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 目前最明显的冲突信号或潜在风险点：1) 整体市场趋势熊市（BTC价格低于SMA50，平均动量负值），可能压制个别资产的反弹。2) ETH和SOL的7d鲸鱼代币流向均为充币抛售（ETH -7,042,227.7 ETH，SOL -2,455,127.6 SOL），表明长期机构仍在减持。3) VIX恐慌指数极高（31.05），显示市场情绪极端恐慌，可能引发流动性危机。这些不会推翻交易结论的理由：冲突信号已被部分定价（如熊市趋势），且微观结构（空头拥挤和强平痛苦）提供了短期催化剂；7d流向反映长期趋势，但24h流向（SOL提币）显示短期积累；VIX高企可能已见顶，轧空通常发生在恐慌极端时。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals or risks: 1) Overall market trend bearish (BTC price below SMA50, avg momentum negative), which could suppress individual asset rebounds. 2) 7d whale token flows for ETH and SOL are to-exchange selling (ETH -7,042,227.7 ETH, SOL -2,455,127.6 SOL), indicating long-term institutional selling. 3) VIX panic index extremely high (31.05), showing extreme fear that could trigger liquidity crisis. Why they don't invalidate the trade: Contrary signals are partially priced in (e.g., bearish trend), and microstructure (crowded shorts and liquidation pain) provides short-term catalyst; 7d flows reflect long-term trend, but 24h flow (SOL withdrawal) shows short-term accumulation; high VIX may be peaking, and squeezes often occur at fear extremes.

analysis_summary.zh: [叙事校验]：当前市场处于熊市环境（BTC RSI_1D=42.3，价格低于SMA50），但宏观背景显示风险偏好（日元走弱），与价格下跌形成分歧，暗示潜在超卖或隐藏积累。新闻焦点缺失，价格走势可能由技术性抛售和清算驱动，而非新基本面冲击。[决策依据详情]：DOGE Qlib分数最高（0.0122），但数据陈旧（2026-03-24），需谨慎。ETH和SOL的鲸鱼代币流向显示7天净流出（ETH -7,042,227.7 ETH，SOL -2,455,127.6 SOL），但SOL 24小时净流入5,804.2 SOL，暗示短期积累。技术指标：DOGE RSI(14)=51.4（中性），ETH RSI(14)=40.4（超卖），SOL RSI(14)=36.9（超卖）。[痛苦交易]：基于爆仓多空比，DOGE=0.13，ETH=0.26，SOL=0.01，显示空头爆仓远多于多头，空头处于痛苦边缘，可能触发轧空。持仓L/S比：DOGE大户账户数比=1.54（多头拥挤），但持仓量比=0.79（空头持仓更重），形成矛盾陷阱。[剧本选择]：选择MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE，因为空头爆仓比例高（SOL 0.01，DOGE 0.13），价格超卖（ETH和SOL RSI<40），且SOL有24小时代币流入（看涨），可能引发空头轧空。TREND_FOLLOWING被拒绝因市场整体熊市，MEAN_REVERSION被拒绝因超卖但无极端反转信号。
analysis_summary.en: [Narrative Validation]: Market is in bearish regime (BTC RSI_1D=42.3, price below SMA50), but macro shows risk-on (Yen weakness), diverging from price drop, suggesting potential oversold or hidden accumulation. No major news, price action likely driven by technical selling and liquidations, not new fundamentals. [Decision Details]: DOGE has highest Qlib score (0.0122) but stale data (2026-03-24), use with caution. ETH and SOL whale token flows show 7d net outflows (ETH -7,042,227.7 ETH, SOL -2,455,127.6 SOL), but SOL has 24h net inflow 5,804.2 SOL, hinting short-term accumulation. Technicals: DOGE RSI(14)=51.4 (neutral), ETH RSI(14)=40.4 (oversold), SOL RSI(14)=36.9 (oversold). [Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation ratios, DOGE=0.13, ETH=0.26, SOL=0.01, indicating short liquidations far exceed longs, shorts are trapped, potential squeeze. L/S ratios: DOGE whale account ratio=1.54 (long crowded) but position ratio=0.79 (short heavier), creating a trap. [Scenario Selection]: Choose MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE due to high short liquidation ratios (SOL 0.01, DOGE 0.13), oversold prices (ETH and SOL RSI<40), and SOL 24h token inflow (bullish), likely triggering short squeeze. TREND_FOLLOWING rejected due to overall bear market, MEAN_REVERSION rejected due to oversold but no extreme reversal signals.

red_team_audit.zh: 如果我的判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 市场持续熊市，超卖可能进一步加深，价格跌破关键支撑（如SOL $82.00），导致多头止损。2) 鲸鱼流向可能反转，SOL 24小时流入是噪音，7天流出趋势占主导，表明机构仍在抛售。3) 爆仓多空比低可能反映市场缺乏买盘，而非轧空动力，价格可能横盘或阴跌。数据支撑：ETH 7天代币流出-7,042,227.7 ETH（看跌），BTC价格低于SMA50（看跌），VIX恐慌指数31.05（极端恐慌）。
red_team_audit.en: If my thesis is wrong, the most likely reasons are: 1) Bear market persists, oversold conditions could worsen, prices break key supports (e.g., SOL $82.00), triggering long stops. 2) Whale flows may reverse, SOL 24h inflow is noise, 7d outflow trend dominates, indicating continued institutional selling. 3) Low liquidation ratios may reflect lack of buying pressure, not squeeze momentum, prices could chop or drift lower. Supporting data: ETH 7d token outflow -7,042,227.7 ETH (bearish), BTC price below SMA50 (bearish), VIX panic index 31.05 (extreme panic).

analysis_summary.zh: [叙事校验]：当前市场处于熊市环境（BTC RSI_1D=42.3，价格低于SMA50），但宏观背景显示风险偏好（日元走弱），与价格下跌形成分歧，暗示潜在超卖或隐藏积累。新闻焦点缺失，价格走势可能由技术性抛售和清算驱动，而非新基本面冲击。[决策依据详情]：DOGE Qlib分数最高（0.0122），但数据陈旧（2026-03-24），需谨慎。ETH和SOL的鲸鱼代币流向显示7天净流出（ETH -7,042,227.7 ETH，SOL -2,455,127.6 SOL），但SOL 24小时净流入5,804.2 SOL，暗示短期积累。技术指标：DOGE RSI(14)=51.4（中性），ETH RSI(14)=40.4（超卖），SOL RSI(14)=36.9（超卖）。[痛苦交易]：基于爆仓多空比，DOGE=0.13，ETH=0.26，SOL=0.01，显示空头爆仓远多于多头，空头处于痛苦边缘，可能触发轧空。持仓L/S比：DOGE大户账户数比=1.54（多头拥挤），但持仓量比=0.79（空头持仓更重），形成矛盾陷阱。[剧本选择]：选择MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE，因为空头爆仓比例高（SOL 0.01，DOGE 0.13），价格超卖（ETH和SOL RSI<40），且SOL有24小时代币流入（看涨），可能引发空头轧空。TREND_FOLLOWING被拒绝因市场整体熊市，MEAN_REVERSION被拒绝因超卖但无极端反转信号。
analysis_summary.en: [Narrative Validation]: Market is in bearish regime (BTC RSI_1D=42.3, price below SMA50), but macro shows risk-on (Yen weakness), diverging from price drop, suggesting potential oversold or hidden accumulation. No major news, price action likely driven by technical selling and liquidations, not new fundamentals. [Decision Details]: DOGE has highest Qlib score (0.0122) but stale data (2026-03-24), use with caution. ETH and SOL whale token flows show 7d net outflows (ETH -7,042,227.7 ETH, SOL -2,455,127.6 SOL), but SOL has 24h net inflow 5,804.2 SOL, hinting short-term accumulation. Technicals: DOGE RSI(14)=51.4 (neutral), ETH RSI(14)=40.4 (oversold), SOL RSI(14)=36.9 (oversold). [Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation ratios, DOGE=0.13, ETH=0.26, SOL=0.01, indicating short liquidations far exceed longs, shorts are trapped, potential squeeze. L/S ratios: DOGE whale account ratio=1.54 (long crowded) but position ratio=0.79 (short heavier), creating a trap. [Scenario Selection]: Choose MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE due to high short liquidation ratios (SOL 0.01, DOGE 0.13), oversold prices (ETH and SOL RSI<40), and SOL 24h token inflow (bullish), likely triggering short squeeze. TREND_FOLLOWING rejected due to overall bear market, MEAN_REVERSION rejected due to oversold but no extreme reversal signals.

analysis_summary.zh: [叙事校验]：当前市场处于熊市环境（1D RSI均低于50），但4H级别出现分化。宏观上，美元走强（DXY 100.15）和VIX恐慌指数上升（31.05）带来风险规避情绪，但日元疲软（USD/JPY 159.704）暗示部分风险偏好。价格走势与新闻脱节，无明显新驱动，属于动能衰竭阶段。QLib数据显示DOGE和SOL相对强势，但整体市场情绪偏空（平均资金费率-0.0008%）。[决策依据详情]：DOGE Qlib分数0.0138（排名第一），RSI 57.46中性偏强，资金费率Z-Score 103.6%极高，显示多头拥挤；SOL Qlib分数0.0054（排名第二），RSI 38.26超卖，资金费率-0.0133%负值，空头压力大。鲸鱼数据：ETH 24h代币流向-154,429.5 ETH（充币抛售），稳定币流向-$4M（资金离场），看跌；SOL 24h代币流向-321,114.7 SOL（充币抛售），但稳定币流向+$482k（资金流入），分歧明显。[痛苦交易]：基于爆仓多空比，DOGE为0.14（空头爆仓远多于多头），ETH为0.26，BTC为0.40，显示空头正遭受强平痛苦，潜在轧空机会；但DOGE资金费率极高，多头拥挤，存在多头挤压风险。[剧本选择]：选择MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE，因为当前市场空头爆仓比例高（如DOGE、ETH、BTC），但部分资产（如DOGE）多头拥挤，需精准定位轧空与挤压的微观结构，避免趋势跟随（整体熊市）和均值回归（技术指标未达极端）。
analysis_summary.en: [Narrative Validation]: Market is in a bearish regime (1D RSI all below 50), but 4H shows divergence. Macro-wise, strong USD (DXY 100.15) and rising VIX (31.05) indicate risk-off, but weak Yen (USD/JPY 159.704) suggests some risk appetite. Price action lacks new drivers, signaling momentum exhaustion. QLib shows DOGE and SOL with relative strength, but overall sentiment is bearish (avg funding -0.0008%). [Decision Details]: DOGE Qlib score 0.0138 (rank 1), RSI 57.46 neutral-strong, funding Z-Score 103.6% extremely high, indicating crowded longs; SOL Qlib score 0.0054 (rank 2), RSI 38.26 oversold, funding -0.0133% negative, showing short pressure. Whale data: ETH 24h token flow -154,429.5 ETH (to exchange), stablecoin flow -$4M (out), bearish; SOL 24h token flow -321,114.7 SOL (to exchange) but stablecoin flow +$482k (in), showing divergence. [Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation ratios, DOGE 0.14, ETH 0.26, BTC 0.40, indicating shorts are suffering, potential squeeze opportunities; but DOGE has extremely high funding, crowded longs, posing long squeeze risk. [Scenario Selection]: Choose MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE, as high short liquidation ratios (e.g., DOGE, ETH, BTC) suggest forced covering, but some assets (e.g., DOGE) have crowded longs, requiring precise targeting of squeeze vs. trap microstructures, avoiding trend following (overall bearish) and mean reversion (technicals not extreme).

red_team_audit.zh: 如果我的判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 宏观风险加剧（如美联储加息预期上升）导致全市场下跌，轧空机会被压制；2) DOGE的高资金费率可能持续，引发多头平仓而非轧空，价格下跌；3) SOL的稳定币流入可能不足，代币抛售压力主导，价格继续走弱。数据支撑：ETH和SOL的24h代币流向均为负（充币抛售），显示鲸鱼看跌；整体市场情绪偏空（平均动量-0.0066），可能延续下跌趋势。
red_team_audit.en: If my thesis is wrong, the most likely reasons are: 1) Macro risks intensify (e.g., Fed rate hike expectations) causing broad market decline, suppressing squeeze opportunities; 2) DOGE's high funding rate persists, triggering long unwinding instead of squeeze, leading to price drop; 3) SOL's stablecoin inflow may be insufficient, token selling pressure dominates, price continues weak. Supporting data: ETH and SOL 24h token flows are negative (to exchange), indicating whale bearishness; overall market sentiment is bearish (avg momentum -0.0066), potentially extending downtrend.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 最明显的冲突信号：1) DOGE资金费率Z-Score 103.6%极高，多头拥挤，可能引发挤压而非轧空；2) ETH和SOL的24h代币流向均为负（充币抛售），与看涨轧空剧本矛盾。解释：DOGE的空头爆仓比极高（0.14），显示空头痛苦更大，即使多头拥挤，轧空潜力仍存；ETH和SOL的稳定币流向有分歧（SOL流入），且技术面超卖（SOL RSI 38.26），可能缓解抛压，支持局部轧空。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals: 1) DOGE funding Z-Score 103.6% extremely high, crowded longs, may cause squeeze instead of short squeeze; 2) ETH and SOL 24h token flows negative (to exchange), contradicting bullish squeeze thesis. Justification: DOGE's short liquidation ratio is very high (0.14), indicating greater short pain, so squeeze potential remains despite crowded longs; ETH and SOL have divergent stablecoin flows (SOL inflow), and technicals are oversold (SOL RSI 38.26), possibly alleviating selling pressure, supporting local squeeze.

technical_signal.zh: 1) 上/下影线比率：DOGE上影线14%/下影线19%，抛压较轻；SOL上影线15%/下影线40%，下影线长显示买盘支撑；ETH上影线24%/下影线43%，类似支撑。2) RSI与ADX状态：DOGE RSI 57.46中性偏强，ADX 22.1趋势弱；SOL RSI 38.26超卖，ADX 37.8趋势中等；ETH RSI 40.5偏弱，ADX 32.3趋势中等。3) 价格与均线偏离度：DOGE偏离SMA50 +1.17%（看涨），SOL偏离-4.90%（看跌），ETH偏离-3.45%（看跌）。

macro_onchain.zh: 1) 24h强平数据及多空强平比：DOGE多单爆仓$254,855/空单$1,836,202（比0.14），ETH多单$1,198,743/空单$4,635,942（比0.26），BTC多单$1,438,949/空单$3,582,518（比0.40），显示空头痛苦显著。2) 巨鲸资金净流入/流出：ETH稳定币流出-$4M，SOL稳定币流入+$482k，分歧。3) 当前资金费率状态：DOGE 0.0100%（极高），SOL -0.0133%（负），ETH 0.0013%（近零）。

regime_safety.zh: 选择‘鲸鱼轧空’ (WHALE_SQUEEZE)。依据：市场空头爆仓比例高（DOGE 0.14, ETH 0.26, BTC 0.40），显示强制平仓风险；技术面超卖（SOL RSI 38.26）和下影线支撑，配合稳定币流入（SOL），支持局部轧空剧本。避免均值回归（技术指标未达极端如RSI<25）和缩量蓄势（ATR未明显下降）。
regime_safety.en: Select WHALE_SQUEEZE. analysis_summary.zh: [叙事校验]：当前市场处于熊市环境（1D RSI均低于50），但4H级别出现分化。宏观上，美元走强（DXY 100.15）和VIX恐慌指数上升（31.05）带来风险规避情绪，但日元疲软（USD/JPY 159.704）暗示部分风险偏好。价格走势与新闻脱节，无明显新驱动，属于动能衰竭阶段。QLib数据显示DOGE和SOL相对强势，但整体市场情绪偏空（平均资金费率-0.0008%）。[决策依据详情]：DOGE Qlib分数0.0138（排名第一），RSI 57.46中性偏强，资金费率Z-Score 103.6%极高，显示多头拥挤；SOL Qlib分数0.0054（排名第二），RSI 38.26超卖，资金费率-0.0133%负值，空头压力大。鲸鱼数据：ETH 24h代币流向-154,429.5 ETH（充币抛售），稳定币流向-$4M（资金离场），看跌；SOL 24h代币流向-321,114.7 SOL（充币抛售），但稳定币流向+$482k（资金流入），分歧明显。[痛苦交易]：基于爆仓多空比，DOGE为0.14（空头爆仓远多于多头），ETH为0.26，BTC为0.40，显示空头正遭受强平痛苦，潜在轧空机会；但DOGE资金费率极高，多头拥挤，存在多头挤压风险。[剧本选择]：选择MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE，因为当前市场空头爆仓比例高（如DOGE、ETH、BTC），但部分资产（如DOGE）多头拥挤，需精准定位轧空与挤压的微观结构，避免趋势跟随（整体熊市）和均值回归（技术指标未达极端）。
analysis_summary.en: [Narrative Validation]: Market is in a bearish regime (1D RSI all below 50), but 4H shows divergence. Macro-wise, strong USD (DXY 100.15) and rising VIX (31.05) indicate risk-off, but weak Yen (USD/JPY 159.704) suggests some risk appetite. Price action lacks new drivers, signaling momentum exhaustion. QLib shows DOGE and SOL with relative strength, but overall sentiment is bearish (avg funding -0.0008%). [Decision Details]: DOGE Qlib score 0.0138 (rank 1), RSI 57.46 neutral-strong, funding Z-Score 103.6% extremely high, indicating crowded longs; SOL Qlib score 0.0054 (rank 2), RSI 38.26 oversold, funding -0.0133% negative, showing short pressure. Whale data: ETH 24h token flow -154,429.5 ETH (to exchange), stablecoin flow -$4M (out), bearish; SOL 24h token flow -321,114.7 SOL (to exchange) but stablecoin flow +$482k (in), showing divergence. [Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation ratios, DOGE 0.14, ETH 0.26, BTC 0.40, indicating shorts are suffering, potential squeeze opportunities; but DOGE has extremely high funding, crowded longs, posing long squeeze risk. [Scenario Selection]: Choose MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE, as high short liquidation ratios (e.g., DOGE, ETH, BTC) suggest forced covering, but some assets (e.g., DOGE) have crowded longs, requiring precise targeting of squeeze vs. trap microstructures, avoiding trend following (overall bearish) and mean reversion (technicals not extreme).

red_team_audit.zh: 如果我的判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 宏观风险加剧（如美联储加息预期上升）导致全市场下跌，轧空机会被压制；2) DOGE的高资金费率可能持续，引发多头平仓而非轧空，价格下跌；3) SOL的稳定币流入可能不足，代币抛售压力主导，价格继续走弱。数据支撑：ETH和SOL的24h代币流向均为负（充币抛售），显示鲸鱼看跌；整体市场情绪偏空（平均动量-0.0066），可能延续下跌趋势。
red_team_audit.en: If my thesis is wrong, the most likely reasons are: 1) Macro risks intensify (e.g., Fed rate hike expectations) causing broad market decline, suppressing squeeze opportunities; 2) DOGE's high funding rate persists, triggering long unwinding instead of squeeze, leading to price drop; 3) SOL's stablecoin inflow may be insufficient, token selling pressure dominates, price continues weak. Supporting data: ETH and SOL 24h token flows are negative (to exchange), indicating whale bearishness; overall market sentiment is bearish (avg momentum -0.0066), potentially extending downtrend.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 最明显的冲突信号：1) DOGE资金费率Z-Score 103.6%极高，多头拥挤，可能引发挤压而非轧空；2) ETH和SOL的24h代币流向均为负（充币抛售），与看涨轧空剧本矛盾。解释：DOGE的空头爆仓比极高（0.14），显示空头痛苦更大，即使多头拥挤，轧空潜力仍存；ETH和SOL的稳定币流向有分歧（SOL流入），且技术面超卖（SOL RSI 38.26），可能缓解抛压，支持局部轧空。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals: 1) DOGE funding Z-Score 103.6% extremely high, crowded longs, may cause squeeze instead of short squeeze; 2) ETH and SOL 24h token flows negative (to exchange), contradicting bullish squeeze thesis. Justification: DOGE's short liquidation ratio is very high (0.14), indicating greater short pain, so squeeze potential remains despite crowded longs; ETH and SOL have divergent stablecoin flows (SOL inflow), and technicals are oversold (SOL RSI 38.26), possibly alleviating selling pressure, supporting local squeeze.

quantitative_analysis.zh: QLib排名靠前币种：DOGE分数0.0138（排名第一），显著性高；SOL分数0.0054（排名第二），中等。量价偏差：DOGE资金费率Z-Score 103.6%极高，统计异常，显示多头过热；SOL资金费率Z-Score -45.2%负值，空头压力大。

regime_safety.zh: 选择‘鲸鱼轧空’ (WHALE_SQUEEZE)。依据：市场空头爆仓比例高（DOGE 0.14, ETH 0.26, BTC 0.40），显示强制平仓风险；技术面超卖（SOL RSI 38.26）和下影线支撑，配合稳定币流入（SOL），支持局部轧空剧本。避免均值回归（技术指标未达极端如RSI<25）和缩量蓄势（ATR未明显下降）。
regime_safety.en: Select WHALE_SQUEEZE. Justification: High short liquidation ratios (DOGE 0.14, ETH 0.26, BTC 0.40) indicate forced covering risk; oversold technicals (SOL RSI 38.26) and lower wick support, coupled with stablecoin inflow (SOL), support local squeeze thesis. Avoid mean reversion (technicals not extreme e.g., RSI<25) and chop accumulation (ATR not significantly decreasing).

analysis_summary.en: [Narrative Validation]: Market is in bearish regime (BTC RSI_1D=42.6, price below SMA50), macro shows VIX at 31.05 (extreme panic) but USD/JPY strength (risk-on contradiction). Price action lacks new drivers, indicating momentum exhaustion. QLib shows DOGE and SOL relative strength, but overall sentiment bearish (avg funding -0.0008%). [Decision Details]: DOGE Qlib score 0.0138 (rank 1), RSI 57.46 (neutral-strong), funding Z-Score 103.6% (extreme positive premium), but liquidation ratio 0.01 (shorts heavily liquidated). SOL Qlib score 0.0054 (rank 2), RSI 38.26 (oversold), funding Z-Score -45.24% (negative premium), whale token flow shows 24h deposit 326,917.7 SOL (bearish), but stablecoin inflow $453,129 (bullish). [Pain Trade]: DOGE shorts most crowded (LS ratio accounts 1.52, position 0.80), 24h liquidation ratio 0.01 (short liquidation >> long), short squeeze risk. SOL longs crowded (LS ratio accounts 1.75, position 0.84), but negative funding and token selling may trigger long squeeze. [Scenario Selection]: Choose MEAN_REVERSION playbook, as DOGE and SOL show extreme sentiment readings (DOGE high funding Z-Score, SOL oversold RSI), price deviations from SMA (DOGE +1.15%, SOL -4.91%), and liquidation data indicates contrarian pain trade opportunities.

red_team_audit.zh: 如果我的判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 市场整体熊市延续，极端情绪读数可能进一步恶化（如DOGE资金费率Z-Score继续上升导致多头过热，SOL RSI超卖后继续下跌），而非均值回归。2) 鲸鱼数据矛盾：SOL代币抛售可能预示更大下跌，稳定币流入可能不足抵消。3) 宏观风险：VIX恐慌指数高企可能引发全市场抛售，抵消个别币种机会。数据支撑反面结论：BTC和ETH技术面均偏空（RSI<42，价格低于SMA50），可能拖累小币种；DOGE爆仓多空比极低可能已反映空头痛苦，但价格未涨显示买盘不足。
red_team_audit.en: If my thesis is wrong, the most likely reasons are: 1) Overall bear market persists, extreme readings may worsen (e.g., DOGE funding Z-Score rises further causing long overheating, SOL RSI oversold continues down), not mean reversion. 2) Whale data contradictions: SOL token selling may signal deeper decline, stablecoin inflow may be insufficient. 3) Macro risks: High VIX may trigger broad sell-off, overshadowing individual coin opportunities. Data supporting opposite view: BTC and ETH technically bearish (RSI<42, price below SMA50), may drag alts; DOGE liquidation ratio very low may already reflect short pain, but lack of price rise shows weak buying.

Justification: DOGE extreme premium may have attracted shorts, liquidation data shows greater short pain, price holding suggests support; SOL oversold RSI and negative funding provide cushion, stablecoin inflow may precede price rebound; alts can decouple in bear markets, especially at sentiment extremes.

analysis_summary.zh: [叙事校验]：当前市场处于熊市环境（BTC RSI_1D=42.6，价格低于SMA50），宏观背景显示VIX恐慌指数升至31.05（极端恐慌），但美元/日元走强（风险偏好矛盾）。价格走势与新闻无明显新驱动，属于动能衰竭阶段。QLib数据显示DOGE和SOL相对强势，但整体市场情绪偏空（平均资金费率-0.0008%）。[决策依据详情]：DOGE Qlib分数0.0138（排名第一），RSI 57.46（中性偏强），资金费率Z-Score 103.6%（极端正溢价），但爆仓多空比0.01（空头被大量强平）。SOL Qlib分数0.0054（排名第二），RSI 38.26（超卖），资金费率Z-Score -45.24%（负溢价），鲸鱼代币流向显示24h充币抛售326,917.7 SOL（看跌），但稳定币流入$453,129（看涨）。[痛苦交易]：DOGE空头最拥挤（持仓L/S比账户数1.52，持仓量比0.80），24h爆仓多空比0.01（空头强平远多于多头），存在空头轧空风险。SOL多头较拥挤（持仓L/S比账户数1.75，持仓量比0.84），但资金费率负溢价和代币抛售可能引发多头挤压。[剧本选择]：选择MEAN_REVERSION剧本，因为DOGE和SOL均出现极端情绪读数（DOGE资金费率Z-Score极高，SOL RSI超卖），价格偏离均线（DOGE偏离+1.15%，SOL偏离-4.91%），且爆仓数据指示反向痛苦交易机会。
analysis_summary.en: [Narrative Validation]: Market is in bearish regime (BTC RSI_1D=42.6, price below SMA50), macro shows VIX at 31.05 (extreme panic) but USD/JPY strength (risk-on contradiction). Price action lacks new drivers, indicating momentum exhaustion. QLib shows DOGE and SOL relative strength, but overall sentiment bearish (avg funding -0.0008%). [Decision Details]: DOGE Qlib score 0.0138 (rank 1), RSI 57.46 (neutral-strong), funding Z-Score 103.6% (extreme positive premium), but liquidation ratio 0.01 (shorts heavily liquidated). SOL Qlib score 0.0054 (rank 2), RSI 38.26 (oversold), funding Z-Score -45.24% (negative premium), whale token flow shows 24h deposit 326,917.7 SOL (bearish), but stablecoin inflow $453,129 (bullish). [Pain Trade]: DOGE shorts most crowded (LS ratio accounts 1.52, position 0.80), 24h liquidation ratio 0.01 (short liquidation >> long), short squeeze risk. SOL longs crowded (LS ratio accounts 1.75, position 0.84), but negative funding and token selling may trigger long squeeze. [Scenario Selection]: Choose MEAN_REVERSION playbook, as DOGE and SOL show extreme sentiment readings (DOGE high funding Z-Score, SOL oversold RSI), price deviations from SMA (DOGE +1.15%, SOL -4.91%), and liquidation data indicates contrarian pain trade opportunities.

red_team_audit.zh: 如果我的判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 市场整体熊市延续，极端情绪读数可能进一步恶化（如DOGE资金费率Z-Score继续上升导致多头过热，SOL RSI超卖后继续下跌），而非均值回归。2) 鲸鱼数据矛盾：SOL代币抛售可能预示更大下跌，稳定币流入可能不足抵消。3) 宏观风险：VIX恐慌指数高企可能引发全市场抛售，抵消个别币种机会。数据支撑反面结论：BTC和ETH技术面均偏空（RSI<42，价格低于SMA50），可能拖累小币种；DOGE爆仓多空比极低可能已反映空头痛苦，但价格未涨显示买盘不足。
red_team_audit.en: If my thesis is wrong, the most likely reasons are: 1) Overall bear market persists, extreme readings may worsen (e.g., DOGE funding Z-Score rises further causing long overheating, SOL RSI oversold continues down), not mean reversion. 2) Whale data contradictions: SOL token selling may signal deeper decline, stablecoin inflow may be insufficient. 3) Macro risks: High VIX may trigger broad sell-off, overshadowing individual coin opportunities. Data supporting opposite view: BTC and ETH technically bearish (RSI<42, price below SMA50), may drag alts; DOGE liquidation ratio very low may already reflect short pain, but lack of price rise shows weak buying.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 最明显的冲突信号：1) DOGE资金费率Z-Score 103.6%极高，通常预示多头过热和回调风险，而非轧空机会。2) SOL鲸鱼代币流向24h充币抛售326,917.7 SOL，与看涨稳定币流入矛盾，可能表明内部人看跌。3) 全市场熊市环境（BTC RSI_1D 42.6）可能压制任何反弹。解释：DOGE极端正溢价可能已吸引空头，爆仓数据显示空头痛苦更大，价格未跌反映支撑；SOL超卖RSI和负资金费率提供缓冲，稳定币流入可能先于价格反弹；小币种在熊市中可独立表现，尤其当情绪极端时。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals: 1) DOGE funding Z-Score 103.6% extremely high, usually indicates long overheating and pullback risk, not squeeze. 2) SOL whale token flow 24h deposit 326,917.7 SOL, contradicts bullish stablecoin inflow, may indicate insider bearishness. 3) Overall bear market (BTC RSI_1D 42.6) may suppress any bounce. Justification: DOGE extreme premium may have attracted shorts, liquidation data shows greater short pain, price holding suggests support; SOL oversold RSI and negative funding provide cushion, stablecoin inflow may precede price rebound; alts can decouple in bear markets, especially at sentiment extremes.

rejection_report.detail: 🛡️ LIQUIDITY TRAP: DOGE L/S Ratio is too low (0.01). Shorts already squeezed. No more fuel to go higher. REJECTED.

analysis_summary.zh:
[叙事校验]：当前市场整体处于熊市环境（1D RSI均低于50，价格低于SMA50），宏观背景显示VIX恐慌指数上升至31.05（极端恐慌），美元走强（DXY 100.15），风险偏好下降。价格走势与负面宏观一致，但部分资产（如SOL）出现技术面超卖（RSI 32.88）和资金费率极端负值（-0.0187%，Z-Score -88.85%），暗示空头过度拥挤，可能形成空头陷阱。新闻面暂无新驱动，市场情绪已部分定价熊市，但鲸鱼数据揭示分歧：ETH有代币提币囤货（24h +290万ETH）但稳定币流出（-200万美元），SOL有代币充币抛售（24h -23万SOL）但稳定币流入（+41万美元），表明机构在ETH积累而在SOL减持，但散户可能反向操作。
[决策依据详情]：SOL的Qlib分数最高（0.0062，排名第1），技术面RSI 32.88（超卖），资金费率Z-Score -88.85%（极端负值），爆仓多空比1.97（多头爆仓高于空头），持仓L/S比显示大户账户数多空比1.77（多头拥挤），但价格在82.74附近持稳，上影线比率55%高于下影线22%（抛压存在但支撑较弱）。ETH的Qlib分数0.0023（排名第3），RSI 32.45（超卖），资金费率Z-Score -124.73%（更极端负值），爆仓多空比0.57（空头爆仓高于多头），代币流向提币囤货（看涨）但稳定币流出（看跌），形成数据矛盾。
[痛苦交易]：基于爆仓多空比，SOL多头正在遭受痛苦（爆仓多空比1.97），但空头因极端负资金费率可能被挤压；ETH空头正在痛苦（爆仓多空比0.57），但多头因价格下跌和稳定币流出而受压。整体市场最拥挤的是SOL多头（持仓L/S比1.77）和ETH空头（爆仓多空比低），潜在陷阱是SOL多头挤压或ETH空头轧空。
[剧本选择]：选择MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE剧本，因为SOL和ETH均出现极端负资金费率（Z-Score <-80%）和超卖RSI（<35），但价格持稳，可能触发空头轧空。SOL的Qlib高分支持反弹，而ETH的鲸鱼代币提币暗示积累，但稳定币流出增加不确定性。优先在SOL上开多，因数据更集中（Qlib排名第1，技术面超卖，空头拥挤），而ETH需监控稳定币流向反转。
analysis_summary.en:
[Narrative Validation]: The overall market is in a bearish regime (1D RSI all below 50, price below SMA50), with macro context showing VIX rising to 31.05 (extreme panic) and DXY strengthening to 100.15 (risk-off). Price action aligns with negative macro, but some assets (e.g., SOL) show oversold conditions (RSI 32.88) and extreme negative funding (rate -0.0187%, Z-Score -88.85%), indicating overcrowded shorts and potential short traps. No new news drivers; bearish sentiment may be partially priced. Whale data reveals divergence: ETH has token withdrawal accumulation (24h +2.9M ETH) but stablecoin outflow (-$2M), SOL has token deposit selling (24h -233K SOL) but stablecoin inflow (+$411K), suggesting institutional accumulation in ETH but distribution in SOL, while retail may act opposite.
[Decision Details]: SOL has the highest Qlib score (0.0062, rank 1), technicals show RSI 32.88 (oversold), funding Z-Score -88.85% (extreme negative), liquidation long/short ratio 1.97 (more long liquidations), and whale L/S ratio 1.77 (crowded long), but price holds around 82.74 with upper wick ratio 55% vs lower 22% (selling pressure but weak support). ETH has Qlib score 0.0023 (rank 3), RSI 32.45 (oversold), funding Z-Score -124.73% (more extreme negative), liquidation ratio 0.57 (more short liquidations), token flow withdrawal (bullish) but stablecoin outflow (bearish), creating data conflict.
[Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation ratios, SOL longs are in pain (ratio 1.97), but shorts may be squeezed due to extreme negative funding; ETH shorts are in pain (ratio 0.57), but longs are pressured by price drop and stablecoin outflow. The most crowded sides are SOL longs (whale L/S ratio 1.77) and ETH shorts (low liquidation ratio), with potential traps being SOL long squeeze or ETH short squeeze.
[Scenario Selection]: Choose MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE playbook, as both SOL and ETH show extreme negative funding (Z-Score <-80%) and oversold RSI (<35) with price holding, potentially triggering short squeezes. SOL's high Qlib score supports a bounce, while ETH's whale token withdrawal suggests accumulation, but stablecoin outflow adds uncertainty. Prioritize long on SOL due to more concentrated data (Qlib rank 1, oversold, short crowding), while ETH needs monitoring for stablecoin flow reversal.

red_team_audit.zh: 如果我的判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 宏观风险加剧（如VIX继续飙升或美元更强）导致全市场下跌，压倒技术面反弹。2) SOL的鲸鱼代币充币抛售（24h -23万SOL）可能预示更多下跌，而非空头轧空。3) ETH的稳定币流出（-200万美元）可能表明资金撤离，抵消代币提币的看涨信号。4) 整体市场情绪仍熊（平均动量-0.0303），Qlib分数虽高但绝对值低（SOL仅0.0062），反弹力度可能有限。数据支撑反面结论：SOL的爆仓多空比1.97显示多头痛苦，价格可能进一步下跌；ETH的ADX 33.5（趋势中等）和上影线比率49%表明抛压，可能难以反转。
red_team_audit.en: If my thesis is wrong, the most likely reasons are: 1) Macro risk escalation (e.g., VIX rising further or DXY strengthening) causing broad market decline, overwhelming technical bounce. 2) SOL's whale token deposit selling (24h -233K SOL) may signal more downside, not a short squeeze. 3) ETH's stablecoin outflow (-$2M) could indicate capital flight, offsetting token withdrawal bullishness. 4) Overall market sentiment remains bearish (avg momentum -0.0303), and Qlib scores, while high, are low in absolute terms (SOL only 0.0062), limiting rebound potential. Data supporting opposite view: SOL's liquidation ratio 1.97 shows long pain, price may drop further; ETH's ADX 33.5 (moderate trend) and upper wick ratio 49% indicate selling pressure, making reversal difficult.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 目前最明显的冲突信号或潜在风险点：1) SOL的鲸鱼代币流向为充币抛售（24h -23万SOL），这与看涨的空头轧空剧本矛盾，可能表明内部人士在减持。2) ETH的稳定币流出（-200万美元）与代币提币囤货背离，增加不确定性。3) 全市场趋势熊市（1D RSI均低于50），可能压制任何反弹。这些不会推翻交易结论的原因：SOL的极端负资金费率（Z-Score -88.85%）和超卖RSI（32.88）优先于代币流向，因为资金费率反映杠杆头寸拥挤，更可能触发轧空；ETH的代币提币（+290万ETH）是强看涨信号，稳定币流出可能短期波动；且Qlib模型预测SOL相对强势，提供量化支撑。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals or risks: 1) SOL's whale token flow is deposit selling (24h -233K SOL), contradicting the bullish short squeeze playbook, possibly indicating insider distribution. 2) ETH's stablecoin outflow (-$2M) diverges from token withdrawal accumulation, adding uncertainty. 3) Overall market trend is bearish (1D RSI all below 50), potentially capping any bounce. Why they don't invalidate the trade: SOL's extreme negative funding (Z-Score -88.85%) and oversold RSI (32.88) take precedence over token flow, as funding reflects leveraged position crowding more likely to trigger squeeze; ETH's token withdrawal (+2.9M ETH) is a strong bullish signal, stablecoin outflow may be short-term noise; and Qlib model predicts SOL relative strength, providing quantitative support.

SOL's Qlib score is significantly higher than others (59% higher than BNB, 170% higher than ETH), and its funding Z-Score -88.85% is a statistical extreme, supporting relative strength and short squeeze playbook. Volume/price deviations: SOL's OI change +0.27% and OI RSI 69.77 show moderate open interest, but funding Z-Score异常 low indicates over-leveraged shorts.

entry_reason.zh: 1) 为何是此币：ETH技术面超卖（RSI 32.45），资金费率极端负（Z-Score -124.73%），爆仓多空比0.57（空头痛苦），鲸鱼代币提币囤货（24h +290万ETH）看涨，但稳定币流出（-200万美元）看跌。2) 为何是现在：价格1995.15，偏离SMA50 -4.96%，有均值回归潜力，但数据矛盾增加不确定性。3) 手动盈亏比(RRR)计算：入场价1995.15，止损价1970（风险1.26%），止盈价2050（盈利2.75%），盈亏比=2.75%/1.26%=2.18 >= 1.5。4) 单笔风险占NAV比例：风险金额可计算，但稳定币流出与代币提币背离，需等待更清晰信号，因此选择monitor。盈亏比充足，但冲突信号需谨慎。
entry_reason.en: 1) Why this coin: ETH technically oversold (RSI 32.45), extreme negative funding (Z-Score -124.73%), liquidation ratio 0.57 (short pain), whale token withdrawal accumulation (24h +2.9M ETH) bullish, but stablecoin outflow (-$2M) bearish. 2) Why now: Price 1995.15, deviation from SMA50 -4.96%, mean reversion potential, but data conflict adds uncertainty. 3) RRR Math: Entry 1995.15, SL 1970 (risk 1.26%), TP 2050 (profit 2.75%), RRR=2.75%/1.26%=2.18 >= 1.5. 4) NAV Risk: Risk amount calculable, but stablecoin outflow vs token withdrawal divergence requires clearer signal, so choose monitor. RRR sufficient, but conflicting signals warrant caution.

invalidation.zh: 明确描述：若价格跌破1970（止损位），或稳定币净流向转为正（资金流入），但价格未涨，或RSI上升至>50但ADX下降（趋势减弱），则看涨论点失效，应立即离场。
invalidation.en: Clearly state: if price breaks below 1970 (SL), or stablecoin net flow turns positive (inflow) without price increase, or RSI rises above 50 but ADX decreases (trend weakening), the bullish thesis is invalidated, exit immediately.

analysis_summary.zh:
[叙事校验]：当前市场整体处于熊市环境（1D RSI均低于50，价格低于SMA50），宏观背景显示VIX恐慌指数上升至31.05（极端恐慌），美元走强（DXY 100.15），风险偏好下降。价格走势与负面宏观一致，但部分资产（如SOL）出现技术面超卖（RSI 32.88）和资金费率极端负值（-0.0187%，Z-Score -88.85%），暗示空头过度拥挤，可能形成空头陷阱。新闻面暂无新驱动，市场情绪已部分定价熊市，但鲸鱼数据揭示分歧：ETH有代币提币囤货（24h +290万ETH）但稳定币流出（-200万美元），SOL有代币充币抛售（24h -23万SOL）但稳定币流入（+41万美元），表明机构在ETH积累而在SOL减持，但散户可能反向操作。
[决策依据详情]：SOL的Qlib分数最高（0.0062，排名第1），技术面RSI 32.88（超卖），资金费率Z-Score -88.85%（极端负值），爆仓多空比1.97（多头爆仓高于空头），持仓L/S比显示大户账户数多空比1.77（多头拥挤），但价格在82.74附近持稳，上影线比率55%高于下影线22%（抛压存在但支撑较弱）。ETH的Qlib分数0.0023（排名第3），RSI 32.45（超卖），资金费率Z-Score -124.73%（更极端负值），爆仓多空比0.57（空头爆仓高于多头），代币流向提币囤货（看涨）但稳定币流出（看跌），形成数据矛盾。
[痛苦交易]：基于爆仓多空比，SOL多头正在遭受痛苦（爆仓多空比1.97），但空头因极端负资金费率可能被挤压；ETH空头正在痛苦（爆仓多空比0.57），但多头因价格下跌和稳定币流出而受压。整体市场最拥挤的是SOL多头（持仓L/S比1.77）和ETH空头（爆仓多空比低），潜在陷阱是SOL多头挤压或ETH空头轧空。
[剧本选择]：选择MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE剧本，因为SOL和ETH均出现极端负资金费率（Z-Score <-80%）和超卖RSI（<35），但价格持稳，可能触发空头轧空。SOL的Qlib高分支持反弹，而ETH的鲸鱼代币提币暗示积累，但稳定币流出增加不确定性。优先在SOL上开多，因数据更集中（Qlib排名第1，技术面超卖，空头拥挤），而ETH需监控稳定币流向反转。
analysis_summary.en:
[Narrative Validation]: The overall market is in a bearish regime (1D RSI all below 50, price below SMA50), with macro context showing VIX rising to 31.05 (extreme panic) and DXY strengthening to 100.15 (risk-off). Price action aligns with negative macro, but some assets (e.g., SOL) show oversold conditions (RSI 32.88) and extreme negative funding (rate -0.0187%, Z-Score -88.85%), indicating overcrowded shorts and potential short traps. No new news drivers; bearish sentiment may be partially priced. Whale data reveals divergence: ETH has token withdrawal accumulation (24h +2.9M ETH) but stablecoin outflow (-$2M), SOL has token deposit selling (24h -233K SOL) but stablecoin inflow (+$411K), suggesting institutional accumulation in ETH but distribution in SOL, while retail may act opposite.
[Decision Details]: SOL has the highest Qlib score (0.0062, rank 1), technicals show RSI 32.88 (oversold), funding Z-Score -88.85% (extreme negative), liquidation long/short ratio 1.97 (more long liquidations), and whale L/S ratio 1.77 (crowded long), but price holds around 82.74 with upper wick ratio 55% vs lower 22% (selling pressure but weak support). ETH has Qlib score 0.0023 (rank 3), RSI 32.45 (oversold), funding Z-Score -124.73% (more extreme negative), liquidation ratio 0.57 (more short liquidations), token flow withdrawal (bullish) but stablecoin outflow (bearish), creating data conflict.
[Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation ratios, SOL longs are in pain (ratio 1.97), but shorts may be squeezed due to extreme negative funding; ETH shorts are in pain (ratio 0.57), but longs are pressured by price drop and stablecoin outflow. The most crowded sides are SOL longs (whale L/S ratio 1.77) and ETH shorts (low liquidation ratio), with potential traps being SOL long squeeze or ETH short squeeze.
[Scenario Selection]: Choose MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE playbook, as both SOL and ETH show extreme negative funding (Z-Score <-80%) and oversold RSI (<35) with price holding, potentially triggering short squeezes. SOL's high Qlib score supports a bounce, while ETH's whale token withdrawal suggests accumulation, but stablecoin outflow adds uncertainty. Prioritize long on SOL due to more concentrated data (Qlib rank 1, oversold, short crowding), while ETH needs monitoring for stablecoin flow reversal.

red_team_audit.zh: 如果我的判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 宏观风险加剧（如VIX继续飙升或美元更强）导致全市场下跌，压倒技术面反弹。2) SOL的鲸鱼代币充币抛售（24h -23万SOL）可能预示更多下跌，而非空头轧空。3) ETH的稳定币流出（-200万美元）可能表明资金撤离，抵消代币提币的看涨信号。4) 整体市场情绪仍熊（平均动量-0.0303），Qlib分数虽高但绝对值低（SOL仅0.0062），反弹力度可能有限。数据支撑反面结论：SOL的爆仓多空比1.97显示多头痛苦，价格可能进一步下跌；ETH的ADX 33.5（趋势中等）和上影线比率49%表明抛压，可能难以反转。
red_team_audit.en: If my thesis is wrong, the most likely reasons are: 1) Macro risk escalation (e.g., VIX rising further or DXY strengthening) causing broad market decline, overwhelming technical bounce. 2) SOL's whale token deposit selling (24h -233K SOL) may signal more downside, not a short squeeze. 3) ETH's stablecoin outflow (-$2M) could indicate capital flight, offsetting token withdrawal bullishness. 4) Overall market sentiment remains bearish (avg momentum -0.0303), and Qlib scores, while high, are low in absolute terms (SOL only 0.0062), limiting rebound potential. Data supporting opposite view: SOL's liquidation ratio 1.97 shows long pain, price may drop further; ETH's ADX 33.5 (moderate trend) and upper wick ratio 49% indicate selling pressure, making reversal difficult.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 目前最明显的冲突信号或潜在风险点：1) SOL的鲸鱼代币流向为充币抛售（24h -23万SOL），这与看涨的空头轧空剧本矛盾，可能表明内部人士在减持。2) ETH的稳定币流出（-200万美元）与代币提币囤货背离，增加不确定性。3) 全市场趋势熊市（1D RSI均低于50），可能压制任何反弹。这些不会推翻交易结论的原因：SOL的极端负资金费率（Z-Score -88.85%）和超卖RSI（32.88）优先于代币流向，因为资金费率反映杠杆头寸拥挤，更可能触发轧空；ETH的代币提币（+290万ETH）是强看涨信号，稳定币流出可能短期波动；且Qlib模型预测SOL相对强势，提供量化支撑。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals or risks: 1) SOL's whale token flow is deposit selling (24h -233K SOL), contradicting the bullish short squeeze playbook, possibly indicating insider distribution. 2) ETH's stablecoin outflow (-$2M) diverges from token withdrawal accumulation, adding uncertainty. 3) Overall market trend is bearish (1D RSI all below 50), potentially capping any bounce. Why they don't invalidate the trade: SOL's extreme negative funding (Z-Score -88.85%) and oversold RSI (32.88) take precedence over token flow, as funding reflects leveraged position crowding more likely to trigger squeeze; ETH's token withdrawal (+2.9M ETH) is a strong bullish signal, stablecoin outflow may be short-term noise; and Qlib model predicts SOL relative strength, providing quantitative support.

technical_signal.zh: 1) 上/下影线比率：SOL上影线55%高于下影线22%，表明抛压较强但支撑较弱；ETH上影线49%高于下影线10%，显示类似抛压。2) RSI与ADX状态：SOL RSI 32.88（超卖），ADX 37.7（趋势强）；ETH RSI 32.45（超卖），ADX 33.5（趋势中等）；均支持超卖反弹可能。3) 价格与均线偏离度：SOL偏离SMA50 -6.01%，ETH偏离-4.96%，BNB偏离-3.10%，DOGE偏离-1.72%，BTC偏离-4.36%，均显示价格低于均线，有均值回归潜力。
technical_signal.en: 1) Upper/Lower Wick Ratio: SOL upper 55% vs lower 22%, indicating stronger selling pressure but weaker support; ETH upper 49% vs lower 10%, similar selling pressure. 2) RSI & ADX Status: SOL RSI 32.88 (oversold), ADX 37.7 (strong trend); ETH RSI 32.45 (oversold), ADX 33.5 (moderate trend); both support oversold bounce potential. 3) SMA Deviation: SOL -6.01%, ETH -4.96%, BNB -3.10%, DOGE -1.72%, BTC -4.36%, all show price below SMA, with mean reversion potential.

macro_onchain.zh: 1) 过去24小时强平数据及多空强平比：SOL多单爆仓64.2万美元 vs 空单32.6万美元（比1.97），ETH多单363万美元 vs 空单637万美元（比0.57），BTC多单513万美元 vs 空单446万美元（比1.15），BNB多单11.5万美元 vs 空单5.1万美元（比2.27），DOGE多单3.7万美元 vs 空单56.4万美元（比0.07）。2) 巨鲸资金净流入/流出：ETH代币净流入+290万ETH（提币囤货），稳定币净流出-200万美元；SOL代币净流出-23万SOL（充币抛售），稳定币净流入+41万美元。3) 当前资金费率状态：SOL -0.0187%（极端负），ETH -0.0090%（极端负），BNB 0.0066%（略正），DOGE 0.0035%（略正），BTC 0.0011%（近中性）。
macro_onchain.en: 1) 24h Liquidation Data & Long/Short Ratio: SOL long $641K vs short $326K (ratio 1.97), ETH long $3.63M vs short $6.37M (ratio 0.57), BTC long $5.13M vs short $4.46M (ratio 1.15), BNB long $115K vs short $51K (ratio 2.27), DOGE long $37K vs short $564K (ratio 0.07). 2) Whale Net Inflow/Outflow: ETH token net inflow +2.9M ETH (withdrawal accumulation), stablecoin net outflow -$2M; SOL token net outflow -233K SOL (deposit selling), stablecoin net inflow +$411K. 3) Current Funding Rate: SOL -0.0187% (extreme negative), ETH -0.0090% (extreme negative), BNB 0.0066% (slightly positive), DOGE 0.0035% (slightly positive), BTC 0.0011% (near neutral).

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名靠前的币种：SOL（分数0.0062，排名第1），BNB（0.0039，排名第2），ETH（0.0023，排名第3）。SOL的Qlib分数显著高于其他（比BNB高59%，比ETH高170%），且其资金费率Z-Score -88.85%为统计极端值，支持相对强势和空头轧空剧本。量价偏差：SOL的OI变化+0.27%和OI RSI 69.77显示持仓兴趣中等，但资金费率Z-Score异常低，表明空头过度杠杆。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib top-ranked coins: SOL (score 0.0062, rank 1), BNB (0.0039, rank 2), ETH (0.0023, rank 3). SOL's Qlib score is significantly higher than others (59% higher than BNB, 170% higher than ETH), and its funding Z-Score -88.85% is a statistical extreme, supporting relative strength and short squeeze playbook. Volume/price deviations: SOL's OI change +0.27% and OI RSI 69.77 show moderate open interest, but funding Z-Score异常 low indicates over-leveraged shorts.

regime_safety.zh: 最终判读：WHALE_SQUEEZE（鲸鱼轧空）。依据：SOL和ETH均出现极端负资金费率（Z-Score <-80%）和超卖RSI（<35），但价格在关键支撑位持稳（SOL ~82.74，ETH ~1995.15），且鲸鱼数据揭示潜在积累（ETH代币提币）或空头拥挤（SOL资金费率极端），可能触发强制平仓反弹。市场整体熊市但微观结构支持轧空机会。
regime_safety.en: Select and justify: WHALE_SQUEEZE. Basis: Both SOL and ETH show extreme negative funding (Z-Score <-80%) and oversold RSI (<35), but price holds at key support (SOL ~82.74, ETH ~1995.15), and whale data suggests potential accumulation (ETH token withdrawal) or short crowding (SOL extreme funding), likely triggering forced covering bounce. Overall market bearish but microstructure supports squeeze opportunity.

portfolio_status.en: Portfolio risk check: Total equity $3791.57, cash $3791.57, only holding SOL long position (value $596.87, leverage 3x, PnL -1.4%). Current SL 82.5, TP 86.0. Per original_invalidation_rule: price 82.74 > 82.0 (not triggered), funding Z-Score -88.85% < -50% (not triggered), RSI 32.88 < 50 (not triggered), so long thesis not invalidated. Risk manageable, but monitor SOL price below 82.0 or funding rate recovery.

analysis_summary.zh:
[叙事校验]：当前市场处于全盘熊市环境（1D RSI均低于45，价格低于SMA50），宏观背景显示VIX恐慌指数升至31.05（极端恐慌），美元走强（DXY 100.15），风险偏好下降。价格走势与新闻/宏观一致，无新驱动，属于动能衰竭阶段。
[决策依据详情]：技术面：所有资产RSI_14均低于45（SOL 32.88，ETH 32.45，BTC 31.94），处于超卖区域；ADX中等（ETH 35.6，SOL 38.2）表明趋势强度尚可但未极端；上影线比率高（ETH 56%，SOL 24%）显示上方抛压。量化面：Qlib排名前三为SOL（0.0062）、BNB（0.0039）、ETH（0.0023），但分数绝对值低，信号弱。
[痛苦交易]：基于爆仓多空比：SOL（15.85）、BTC（2.45）、ETH（1.58）显示多头正遭受强平痛苦，空头相对安全；持仓L/S比：SOL（账户数比1.66，持仓量比0.84）、ETH（账户数比1.44，持仓量比0.89）表明散户多头拥挤，机构可能做空。陷阱定位：散户多头在SOL、ETH、BTC上被套，面临挤压风险。
[剧本选择]：选择MEAN_REVERSION剧本，因为技术指标（RSI超卖、价格偏离SMA50达4-6%）和情绪极端（SOL资金费率Z-Score -88.85%）提供反转机会，且鲸鱼流向（ETH代币提币、SOL稳定币流入）暗示潜在底部，但需谨慎因整体趋势仍熊。
analysis_summary.en:
[Narrative Validation]: Market is in a full bear regime (1D RSI all below 45, price below SMA50), macro context shows VIX at 31.05 (extreme panic), DXY strong at 100.15, risk-off sentiment. Price action aligns with news/macro, no new drivers, indicating momentum exhaustion.
[Decision Details]: Technicals: All assets have RSI_14 below 45 (SOL 32.88, ETH 32.45, BTC 31.94), in oversold territory; ADX moderate (ETH 35.6, SOL 38.2) suggests trend strength but not extreme; high upper wick ratios (ETH 56%, SOL 24%) show selling pressure. Quantitative: Qlib top ranks are SOL (0.0062), BNB (0.0039), ETH (0.0023), but scores are low in magnitude, signaling weak strength.
[Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation ratios: SOL (15.85), BTC (2.45), ETH (1.58) indicate longs are suffering liquidation pain, shorts are relatively safe; L/S ratios: SOL (account ratio 1.66, position ratio 0.84), ETH (account ratio 1.44, position ratio 0.89) show retail longs crowded, institutions may be short. Trap identification: Retail longs are trapped in SOL, ETH, BTC, facing squeeze risk.
[Scenario Selection]: Choose MEAN_REVERSION playbook, as technical extremes (oversold RSI, price deviation from SMA50 by 4-6%) and sentiment extremes (SOL funding Z-Score -88.85%) offer reversal potential, and whale flows (ETH token withdrawal, SOL stablecoin inflow) hint at possible bottoming, but caution due to overall bear trend.

red_team_audit.zh: 如果我的判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：整体熊市趋势可能延续，导致超卖状态进一步深化。数据支撑：1) 宏观风险（VIX高、美元强）可能持续压制风险资产；2) 鲸鱼流向矛盾（SOL代币充币抛售、ETH稳定币流出）可能预示更多下跌；3) 爆仓多空比高但价格未反弹，表明抛压未衰竭；4) Qlib分数低，动量不足。
red_team_audit.en: If my thesis is wrong, the most likely reason is: The overall bear trend may persist, leading to further oversold conditions. Supporting data: 1) Macro risks (high VIX, strong DXY) could continue to pressure risk assets; 2) Contradictory whale flows (SOL token deposit selling, ETH stablecoin outflow) may signal more downside; 3) High liquidation ratios without price bounce indicate selling pressure not exhausted; 4) Low Qlib scores suggest weak momentum.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 最明显的冲突信号：1) SOL的鲸鱼代币流向为负（充币抛售），与看涨信号矛盾；2) 整体市场趋势熊市，均值回归可能失败。解释：SOL代币抛售可能被稳定币流入（$389,093）部分抵消，且超卖技术面提供缓冲；熊市趋势中，短期反弹仍可能发生，但需严格止损。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals: 1) SOL whale token flow is negative (deposit selling), contradicting bullish signals; 2) Overall market trend is bearish, mean reversion may fail. Justification: SOL token selling may be partially offset by stablecoin inflow ($389,093), and oversold technicals provide cushion; in bear trends, short-term bounces are still possible, but strict stop-loss is needed.

Volatility deviations: SOL funding Z-Score -88.85% significantly negative, offering mean reversion opportunity; average momentum -0.0303, market weak.

analysis_summary.zh:
[叙事校验]：当前市场处于全盘熊市环境（1D RSI均低于45，价格低于SMA50），宏观背景显示VIX恐慌指数升至31.05（极端恐慌），美元走强（DXY 100.15），风险偏好下降。价格走势与新闻/宏观一致，无新驱动，属于动能衰竭阶段。
[决策依据详情]：技术面：所有资产RSI_14均低于45（SOL 32.88，ETH 32.45，BTC 31.94），处于超卖区域；ADX中等（ETH 35.6，SOL 38.2）表明趋势强度尚可但未极端；上影线比率高（ETH 56%，SOL 24%）显示上方抛压。量化面：Qlib排名前三为SOL（0.0062）、BNB（0.0039）、ETH（0.0023），但分数绝对值低，信号弱。
[痛苦交易]：基于爆仓多空比：SOL（15.85）、BTC（2.45）、ETH（1.58）显示多头正遭受强平痛苦，空头相对安全；持仓L/S比：SOL（账户数比1.66，持仓量比0.84）、ETH（账户数比1.44，持仓量比0.89）表明散户多头拥挤，机构可能做空。陷阱定位：散户多头在SOL、ETH、BTC上被套，面临挤压风险。
[剧本选择]：选择MEAN_REVERSION剧本，因为技术指标（RSI超卖、价格偏离SMA50达4-6%）和情绪极端（SOL资金费率Z-Score -88.85%）提供反转机会，且鲸鱼流向（ETH代币提币、SOL稳定币流入）暗示潜在底部，但需谨慎因整体趋势仍熊。
analysis_summary.en:
[Narrative Validation]: Market is in a full bear regime (1D RSI all below 45, price below SMA50), macro context shows VIX at 31.05 (extreme panic), DXY strong at 100.15, risk-off sentiment. Price action aligns with news/macro, no new drivers, indicating momentum exhaustion.
[Decision Details]: Technicals: All assets have RSI_14 below 45 (SOL 32.88, ETH 32.45, BTC 31.94), in oversold territory; ADX moderate (ETH 35.6, SOL 38.2) suggests trend strength but not extreme; high upper wick ratios (ETH 56%, SOL 24%) show selling pressure. Quantitative: Qlib top ranks are SOL (0.0062), BNB (0.0039), ETH (0.0023), but scores are low in magnitude, signaling weak strength.
[Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation ratios: SOL (15.85), BTC (2.45), ETH (1.58) indicate longs are suffering liquidation pain, shorts are relatively safe; L/S ratios: SOL (account ratio 1.66, position ratio 0.84), ETH (account ratio 1.44, position ratio 0.89) show retail longs crowded, institutions may be short. Trap identification: Retail longs are trapped in SOL, ETH, BTC, facing squeeze risk.
[Scenario Selection]: Choose MEAN_REVERSION playbook, as technical extremes (oversold RSI, price deviation from SMA50 by 4-6%) and sentiment extremes (SOL funding Z-Score -88.85%) offer reversal potential, and whale flows (ETH token withdrawal, SOL stablecoin inflow) hint at possible bottoming, but caution due to overall bear trend.

red_team_audit.zh: 如果我的判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：整体熊市趋势可能延续，导致超卖状态进一步深化。数据支撑：1) 宏观风险（VIX高、美元强）可能持续压制风险资产；2) 鲸鱼流向矛盾（SOL代币充币抛售、ETH稳定币流出）可能预示更多下跌；3) 爆仓多空比高但价格未反弹，表明抛压未衰竭；4) Qlib分数低，动量不足。
red_team_audit.en: If my thesis is wrong, the most likely reason is: The overall bear trend may persist, leading to further oversold conditions. Supporting data: 1) Macro risks (high VIX, strong DXY) could continue to pressure risk assets; 2) Contradictory whale flows (SOL token deposit selling, ETH stablecoin outflow) may signal more downside; 3) High liquidation ratios without price bounce indicate selling pressure not exhausted; 4) Low Qlib scores suggest weak momentum.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 最明显的冲突信号：1) SOL的鲸鱼代币流向为负（充币抛售），与看涨信号矛盾；2) 整体市场趋势熊市，均值回归可能失败。解释：SOL代币抛售可能被稳定币流入（$389,093）部分抵消，且超卖技术面提供缓冲；熊市趋势中，短期反弹仍可能发生，但需严格止损。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals: 1) SOL whale token flow is negative (deposit selling), contradicting bullish signals; 2) Overall market trend is bearish, mean reversion may fail. Justification: SOL token selling may be partially offset by stablecoin inflow ($389,093), and oversold technicals provide cushion; in bear trends, short-term bounces are still possible, but strict stop-loss is needed.

technical_signal.zh: 1) 上/下影线比率：ETH上影线56%表明抛压重，下影线5%托底弱；SOL上影线24%显示阻力，下影线0%无支撑。2) RSI与ADX状态：所有资产RSI_14低于35（超卖），ADX在32-38（中等趋势强度）。3) 价格与均线偏离度：SOL偏离SMA50 -6.00%，ETH -4.94%，BTC -4.34%，表明超卖。
technical_signal.en: 1) Upper/Lower Wick Ratio: ETH upper wick 56% shows heavy selling pressure, lower wick 5% weak support; SOL upper wick 24% indicates resistance, lower wick 0% no support. 2) RSI & ADX status: All assets have RSI_14 below 35 (oversold), ADX 32-38 (moderate trend strength). 3) SMA deviation: SOL -6.00% from SMA50, ETH -4.94%, BTC -4.34%, indicating oversold.

macro_onchain.zh: 1) 24小时强平数据：SOL多单爆仓$779,704 vs 空单$49,187（多空比15.85），BTC多单$6,190,373 vs 空单$2,525,675（多空比2.45），ETH多单$5,494,060 vs 空单$3,480,749（多空比1.58），多头痛苦显著。2) 巨鲸资金流向：ETH代币净流入2,907,530.8 ETH（提币囤货，看涨），稳定币净流出-$1,964,687（资金离场，看跌）；SOL代币净流出-232,999.9 SOL（充币抛售，看跌），稳定币净流入$389,093（准备抄底，看涨）。3) 资金费率：SOL -0.0187%（极端负值），ETH -0.0090%（负值），BNB 0.0066%（轻微正值）。
macro_onchain.en: 1) 24h Liquidation Data: SOL long $779,704 vs short $49,187 (ratio 15.85), BTC long $6,190,373 vs short $2,525,675 (ratio 2.45), ETH long $5,494,060 vs short $3,480,749 (ratio 1.58), longs in significant pain. 2) Whale Net Flow: ETH token net inflow 2,907,530.8 ETH (withdrawal, bullish), stablecoin net outflow -$1,964,687 (capital leaving, bearish); SOL token net outflow -232,999.9 SOL (deposit selling, bearish), stablecoin net inflow $389,093 (preparing to buy, bullish). 3) Funding Rate: SOL -0.0187% (extremely negative), ETH -0.0090% (negative), BNB 0.0066% (slightly positive).

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：SOL（0.0062）、BNB（0.0039）、ETH（0.0023）靠前，但分数低，相对强度弱；DOGE（-0.0025）、BTC（-0.0030）落后。量价偏差：SOL资金费率Z-Score -88.85%显著负值，提供均值回归机会；整体动量平均-0.0303，市场疲软。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib ranking: SOL (0.0062), BNB (0.0039), ETH (0.0023) top-ranked but scores low, indicating weak relative strength; DOGE (-0.0025), BTC (-0.0030) lagging. Volatility deviations: SOL funding Z-Score -88.85% significantly negative, offering mean reversion opportunity; average momentum -0.0303, market weak.

regime_safety.zh: 均值回归 (SAFE_MR)：依据为技术指标超卖（RSI低于35，价格偏离SMA50达4-6%），情绪极端（SOL资金费率负值显著），鲸鱼流向部分看涨（ETH提币、SOL稳定币流入），但整体趋势熊市，需谨慎操作。
regime_safety.en: SAFE_MR: Based on oversold technicals (RSI below 35, price deviation from SMA50 by 4-6%), extreme sentiment (SOL funding rate highly negative), partial bullish whale flows (ETH withdrawal, SOL stablecoin inflow), but overall bear trend requires caution.

original_invalidation_rule.en: Clearly state: if price breaks below $82.00 (SL), or funding Z-Score rises to >-50% (indicating short pressure easing), or RSI rises above 50 without price increase (momentum exhaustion), the long thesis is invalidated, exit immediately.
